name: A - 10yen Stamp
body_html:
Takahashi wants to send a letter to Santa Claus. He has an envelope with an XX-MATH-0-XX-yen (Japanese currency) stamp stuck on it.
To be delivered to Santa Claus, the envelope must have stamps in a total value of at least XX-MATH-1-XX yen.
Takahashi will put some more XX-MATH-2-XX-yen stamps so that the envelope will have stamps worth at least XX-MATH-3-XX yen in total.
At least how many more XX-MATH-4-XX-yen stamps does Takahashi need to put on the envelope?

Constraints

  • XX-MATH-5-XX and XX-MATH-6-XX are integers.
  • XX-MATH-7-XX

Input

Input is given from Standard Input in the following format:

XX-MATH-8-XX XX-MATH-9-XX

Output

Print the answer as an integer.
